---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behaviour in AIOS
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: Cbetts1
---

## Bug Description
A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Boot AIOS: `node aos`
2. Run command: `...`
3. See error

## Expected Behaviour
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour
What actually happened (paste any error output).

## Environment
- **Platform:** (Android/Termux / Linux / macOS / Windows)
- **Node.js version:** (run `node --version`)
- **AIOS version:** (run `version` inside AIOS)
- **Device:** (e.g., Samsung Galaxy S21 / Raspberry Pi 4)

## Additional Context
Any other details, screenshots, or logs.
